invalid_distance: No puedes interactuar con este personaje (%s). ¡Estás demasiado lejos!
invalid_trigger: Esta interacción no está disponible todavía!
invalid_done: Ya has hecho esta interacción con este personaje (%s).
invalid_chest: ¡No puedes robar a este personaje mientras está despierto! (%s)
stories: Todavía quedan muchas historias que contar...
spectator_inv.end: ¡Entra en un jugador para ver su inventario!
rejoin: Todos los jugadores han abandonado. La partida terminará si no se reconectan en 3± segundos.
rejoin.extend: [Haz click aquí para extender la partida.]
play_on_vanilla.msg: Se ha detectado una versión de Minecraft modificada. Si estás en multijugador, esto se puede deber a usar un server.jar de terceros. Este mapa solo funciona en Vanilla, así que por favor, no uses modificaciones/plugins/etc.
wrong_version: ¡Estás usando una versión de Minecraft incorrecta!
wrong_version.msg: Estás usando una versión de Minecraft incorrecta. Por favor, juega el mapa en la versión 1.16.2.
ritual: El Druida ha completado su ritual. El tiempo vuelve hacia atrás. El Druida ha desaparecido.
grimsbane_arrives: » Grimsbane ha llegado a Glarthford. Ten cuidado con acercarte a él. Sería desastroso si iniciara una lucha sin que estés preparado.
ts_escapes: » Parece que alguien estaba cautivo aquí, pero se ha podido escapar por su propia cuenta.
delayed_item: » Son las %1$s. ¡Vuelve a las %2$s para recoger tu %3$s!
loading.st2: Esto puede tardar hasta un minuto.
lumberjack.d: ¿Qué te pasa? Igual no te has dado cuenta, pero estoy bastante ocupado. Podrías traerme un poco de agua bendita?
lumberjack.d2: ¿Qué te pasa? Igual no te has dado cuenta, pero estoy bastante ocupado.
lumberjack.n: Muy valiente tienes que ser, viniendo al Bosque del Ballestero tú solo a estas horas.
lumberjack.a1: "¿Me puedes dar tu pico de piedra?"
lumberjack.1.2: ¿Qué dices, mentiroso? ¡No te voy a dar ná!
lumberjack.2: ¿Cómo has encontrado esto? Aquí tienes, mi vieja pala.
bum.d: ¡He vivido en este vertedero toda mi vida, pero todavía no me rindo! Algun día, seré el hombre más rico del mundo...
bum.n: ¿Dando un paseo nocturno por el vertedero, eh?
bum.a2: Intercambiar Cerveza por Azada de diamante
bum.a2.realms: Intercambiar Bebida nauseabunda por Azada de diamante
bum.2: ¡Gracias por la cerveza amigo! Toma, aquí tienes tu cosa inútil.
bum.2.realms: Toma, aquí tienes tu cosa inútil.
fisher.d: ¡Hoy es un buen día para pescar, lo presiento!
fisher.n: Pues sí, me equivocaba. Solo he pescado una sardinilla hoy...
fisher.n2: Solo he pescado una sardinilla hoy...
fisher.a1: "¿Me puedes prestar tu caña de pescar?"
fisher.1.1: ¡Sí, te la puedo prestar! Pero... ¿podrías traerle a este viejo pescador una cerveza primero?
fisher.a2.realms: Intercambiar Bebida nauseabunda por Caña de pescar
fisher.1.2: Aquí tienes mi caña. ¡Gracias por la cerveza!
priest.d: Buenos días. Que el señor esté contigo.
priest.n: Es un buen momento para rezar, no crees?
priest.1: ¿Oh, qué es esto? ¡El santo Grial! ¡La iglesia lo lleva buscando siglos enteros!
priest.2: ¡Haría cualquier cosa para tener ese anillo! ¡Te puedo dar hasta mi espada!
priest.2.1: ¡Gracias, muchas gracias, muchísimas gracias! ¡Soy un hombre feliz, ahora mismo!
priest.a3: Intercambiar Santo Grial por Bloque Sacro
richard.d: ¿Me puedes ayudar? He perdido un diamante en el lago, mientras nadaba cerca del gran roble. ¿Crees que puedes encontrarlo?
richard.n: ¿Me puedes ayudar, por favor? He perdido un diamante en el lago, mientras nadaba cerca del gran roble esta mañana. Se está haciendo muy tarde. ¿Crees que puedes encontrarlo?
richard.d2: Muchas gracias. No sé qué habría hecho sin tu ayuda.
richard.n2: Muchas gracias. ¿No te cansa buscar tanto?
richard.1: Muchas gracias. No tengo nada para darte, así que te tendrás que conformar con mi agradecimiento.
richard.2: Gracias por la llave, ahora podría abrir la puerta de hierro e irme... Si quisiera.
miner.d.1: Ser minero es duro, pero es lo que hay. Hoy me he olvidado la comida, y no tengo tiempo para volver. ¿Me podrías traer un buen pan recién horneado? Te doy un pico a cambio.
miner.n.1: Estas minas son un lugar bastante solitario, pero ahora mismo no me siento solo, lo que siento es un hambre voraz. ¿Me podrías traer un buen pan recién horneado? Te doy un pico a cambio.
miner.d2.1: Me he comido el pan de un bocado. Estaba buenísimo.
miner.n2.1: Me quiero ir a casa, pero todavía no he acabado. Gracias por el pan de antes, estaba genial.
miner.d.2: Ser minero es duro, pero es lo que hay.
miner.n.2: Estas minas son un lugar bastante solitario.
miner.a1: Intercambiar Pan recién horneado por Pico de piedra
miner.a2: "¿Qué me puedes contar sobre estas minas?"
miner.1: ¡Muchas gracias, me estoy muriendo de hambre!
miner.1x: ¡No me puedo comer esto! ¡Traeme un pan fresco, anda!
miner.2: Pues... hay muchos minerales, e incluso algunas gemas. Yo encontré un rubí una vez... se lo tuve que dar al jefe, claro, y al final no saqué nada de eso. Seguro que hay más, tú sigue buscando.
girl.d: ¡Oh, hola! Me he encontrado una calavera en este sitio... da miedito. Me ha entrado mucha hambre. ¿Tienes pan?
girl.n: ¡¡Ahh!! Me has asustado. Oye, ¿tienes algo de pan? Tengo mucha hambre, llevo aquí todo el día.
girl.a1: Intercambiar Pan por Calavera de esqueleto
girl.1: ¡Gracias! ¡Estaba jugando al escondite con mi hermano, pero no me ha encontrado en todo el día!
druid.d: ¿Por casualidad tienes algo de sangre? Estoy preparando un ritual a medianoche.
druid.n: La luna se alza... ¡El ritual empezará pronto!
druid.d2: Estoy preparando un ritual a medianoche.
druid.a1: Intercambiar Calavera de esqueleto por Ojo de araña fermentado
druid.1: Estaba intentando invocar un demonio, pero solo me ha salido este ojo de araña fermentado. Puedes quedartelo, me iba a deshacer de él...
druid.2: Prefería sangre, pero redstone me sirve. Ten este hilo como recompensa.
witch.d: Tú... ¿Por qué seguís viniendo? ¡Dejad de pedirme que cure a vuestros enfermos! ¡Y ahora no podría hacerlo aunque quisiera, porque se me ha roto el caldero!
witch.n: ¿Qué te trae aquí esta oscura noche?
witch.d2: Tú... ¿Por qué seguís viniendo? ¡Dejad de pedirme que cure a vuestros enfermos!
witch.a1: Intercambiar Ojo de araña fermentado por Pico de diamante
witch.1: Oh sí, un ojo de un araña fermentado. Es justo lo que necesitaba...
witch.a3: "¿Podrías encantar mi Casco de cota de mallas?"
witch.3: ¡Eh, yo no le encanto la armadura a cualquiera que me lo pida! Aunque hace mucho tiempo que no pruebo una buena tarta de calabaza... ¡Traeme tarta de calabaza y ya veremos!
witch.a3.1: Dar Casco de cota de mallas y Tarta de calabaza
witch.3.1: Toma, aquí tienes tu casco. ¡Ahora, deja de molestarme!
witch.4: Justo lo que necesitaba... ¡Ahora, deja de molestarme!
brewer.d: ¡Hola! Espera, ¿cómo has conseguido entrar? No importa. ¿Puedo ayudarte con algo?
brewer.n: Ahh, hoy ha sido un día duro. Al fin puedo tomarme un descanso. Si necesitas algo, no dudes en decirmelo.
brewer.a1: Intercambiar Polvo de blaze por Poción de resistencia al fuego.
brewer.1: Hmm... ¿Polvo de blaze? Genial, dame 2± minutos y tendré tu poción de resistencia al fuego lista.
brewer.a2: Intercambiar Pluma por Poción de velocidad
brewer.2: Hmm... ¿Una pluma? Genial, dame 4± minutos y tendré tu poción de velocidad lista.
brewer.a3: Intercambiar Zanahoria dorada por Poción de salto
brewer.3: Hmm... ¿Una zanahoria dorada? Genial, dame 4± minutos y tendré tu poción de salto lista.
brewer.a4: Intercambiar Azúcar y Manzana por Poción energizante
brewer.4: ¡Con un poco de azúcar y una manzana, puedo hacer una buena poción energizante! Pueden incluso levantar a mi abuela de una de sus siestas. Dame una hora, y haré que sepa bien.
brewer.a10: Intercambiar Lágrima de ghast por Poción de regeneración
brewer.7: Hmm... ¿Una lágrima de ghast? Genial, dame 1± minutos y tendré tu poción de regeneración lista.
brewer.a5: Tomar Poción de resistencia al fuego
brewer.5: Aquí tienes, no te la bebas muy rápido.
brewer.6: Oh, hago lo que me apetezca ese día. Ven cuando quieras y te diré qué estoy haciendo. ¡Y recuerda que siempre tienes que traer tus propios ingredientes!
brewer.d.9: ¡Esos villanos han atacado la destilería! Me gustaría ir, pero ya he tenido suerte escapando al pueblo. Les he visto meterse en el sótano.
brewer.n.9: Han atacado la destilería, pero incluso sin los invasores no podría volver a estas horas. ¡Hay monstruos de noche!
blacksmith.d: ¿Qué tal? ¿Algo que pueda ofrecerte? ¿Una espada nueva, quizás?
blacksmith.d2: ¡Mira por donde! ¡Resulta que sí había gemas en la mina! Y tengo que decir, son realmente preciosas.
blacksmith.n2: El brillo... El brillo de estas gemas es realmente espectacular.
blacksmith.d.3: ¿Qué tal? El otro día me enseñaron unas cosas llamadas Monedas de Blaze. ¡Sería divertido probar a hacer alguna!
blacksmith.n.3: Buenas noches. El otro día me enseñaron unas cosas llamadas Monedas de Blaze. ¡Sería divertido probar a hacer alguna!
blacksmith.d.9: Los invasores le dieron un susto de muerte al Maestro cuando se apoderaron de la destilería. Me alegro de que pudiera refugiarse en el pueblo.
blacksmith.n.9: Esta invasión tiene que acabar. Tú eres fuerte, ¿podrías ir a investigar la destilería a ver si puedes hacer algo?
blacksmith.a1: Comprar Casco de cota de mallas por cinco Lingotes de oro
blacksmith.1: ¡Un casco de cota de mallas! Ligero y efectivo, pero es difícil de hacer.
blacksmith.a2: Intercambiar Hierro por acceso al patio trasero
blacksmith.2: ¡Este hierro me será útil! Puedes usar mi puerta trasera si quieres, aunque no sé para que te serviría. Ahí atrás solo está Ricardo, y ya sabes... Es algo extraño.
blacksmith.3: ¿Cómo? ¿El minero ha encontrado esto? ¿De verdad hay gemas en la mina? ¡Esto tengo que verlo con mis propios ojos!
blacksmith.4: El problema es que necesitaría polvo de Blaze para hacerla, y ahora mismo no tengo.
blacksmith.a4.1: Dar dos piezas de Carbón y Polvo de Blaze
blacksmith.4.1: ¡A trabajar pues! Estará lista en una hora, más o menos.
blacksmith.5: ¡Aquí tienes, tu Moneda de Blaze! Ve con cuidado, está ardiendo.
blacksmith.a10: "¿Te has enterado? El camino a las minas está bloqueado."
blacksmith.10: La verdad, no me interesa para nada ir ahí. Eso sí, si el minero encontrase gemas, desbloquearía ese camino con mis propias manos para verlas. De momento, a mí nadie me ha enseñado nada. ¿Seguirá buscando, no?
farmer.n: Epa, ¿qué haces aquí a estas horas?
farmer.a1: Intercambiar Azada de diamante por acceso a la casa del granjero.
farmer.1: ¡Esta azada es maravillosa! Puedes usar mi puerta si quieres.
farmer.2: Puedes usar mi vieja azada para recogerlos, si quieres. Traemelos cuando acabes.
adventurer.d: En mis viajes siempre encuentro artefactos interesantes y gemas raras, así que tengo muchas cosas que intercambiar. En Ankardia, la capital de Tharros, puedes comprar y vender cualquier cosa.
adventurer.n: En mis viajes siempre encuentro artefactos interesantes y gemas raras, así que tengo muchas cosas que intercambiar. Ahora necesito descansar antes de continuar.
adventurer.d.9: Ojalá pudiera estar junto a mi hoguera conversando con otros exploradores, pero los Invasores están por todos lados. Creo que les vi buscando por el vertedero.
adventurer.n.9: Ojalá pudiera volver a mi tienda, pero los Invasores están por todos lados. ¿Acaso no duermen?
adventurer.a1: Intercambiar Diamante por Perla de ender
adventurer.1: ¡Una auténtica perla de Ender, de las islas del End! Es muy rara, así que no la pierdas.
adventurer.2: De hecho sí. ¿Sabías que se puede escalar la Cascada Esmeralda? Me pregunto que secretos habrá escondidos ahí.
adventurer.4: Por aquí no he visto muchas gemas, pero sé que son muy caras. Solo la gente rica se las pueden permitir, como el Ricardo ese, y la mayoría viven en el pueblo. ¿Conoces a Ricardo? Será muy rico, pero vive en el patio trasero del Herrero.
archaeologist.d: He encontrado esta cueva. Parece como si esta pared fuera una especie de puerta. Me pregunto si podría abrirla con las herramientas adecuadas... ¡Esto podría ser el descubrimiento arqueológico más importante de la historia!
archaeologist.n: Cuando se pone el sol, los sitios como este cobran vida. Los muros hablan de los tiempos antiguos en que fueron creados. Debería encontrar las herramientas necesarias para abrir esta pared y ver qué hay detrás... ¡Esto podría ser el descubrimiento arqueológico más importante de la historia!
archaeologist.g1: He abierto la pared, pero parece que hay un sello. Inspeccionando las marcas, parece que se puede abrir con un rubí. ¿Quizás puedas encontrar uno en las minas?
archaeologist.a1: Intercambiar Pala por Bloque de hueso
archaeologist.1: Una pala me puede ser muy útil ahí dentro, pero no puedo abrir la puerta con ella. Toma estos bloques de hueso, los encontré en el Desierto Furioso.
archaeologist.2: Sí, perfecto. Con esto puedo abrir la pared.
archaeologist.3: ¿Un rubí? ¿Cómo lo has conseguido tan rápido? Espero que esto funcione.
archaeologist.tbc1: No puedes hacer esto tú solo... ¡Pero yo te ayudaré!
merchant1.d: ¡Hola! ¿Qué te puedo ofrecer? ¿Oro? ¿Una espada de diamante?
merchant1.n: ¡Hola, buenas noches! Todavía estás a tiempo de comprar algo.
merchant1.a1: Vender una Manzana por un Lingote de oro
merchant1.a2.1: "No me puedo permitir eso. ¿Puedo pagar de otra forma?"
merchant1.2.1: Hmm... de acuerdo. Dame una Pala de diamante y dos Lingotes de oro. Oferta final.
merchant1.a2.2: Comprar Espada de diamante por Pala de diamante y dos Lingotes de oro
merchant1.2.2: ¡Muchas Gracias! Aquí tienes tu Espada de diamante como te prometí.
enderman.d: La gente deja cosas interesantes tiradas por ahi. ¡Yo las recojo, claro!
enderman.n: Me gusta recoger cosas. Es relajante.
enderman.1: El Astronomo que esta en el observatorio, cerca del vertedero, me dijo que le gustaban mucho los meteoritos. A la ermitana tambien le gustan mucho los meteoritos. Me encantaria recoger uno algun dia.
enderman.2: ¡Que maleducado! Ya no te voy a dar ninguna de mis cosas. ¿Por que no te metes con alguien de tu tamano?
sailor.d: Navegar por este lago es relajante. No hay muchas tormentas por aquí.
sailor.n: Los marineros encontramos nuestra destinación siguiendo las estrellas de noche. Ojalá pudiera hacerlo en el mar. No es muy útil en un lago tan pequeño como este.
sailor.g.10: We marineros reach our destination by following the stars at night. I wish I could do that on the sea. It’s not much use like this.
sailor.d.9: ¡Los invasores se han apoderado de mi barco, me escapé de milagro! Por suerte, el lago está congelado, así que no se lo pueden llevar a ninguna parte.
sailor.n.9: Me gustaría poder volver a mi barco, pero esos piratas de pacotilla siguen por ahí...
sailor.1: Supongo que ya no necesito esto, así que te lo puedes quedar. En su momento tuvimos una fuga, y lo usé para sacar el agua. ¡Pero ahora ya está bien, lo arreglé!
sailor.a2: Intercambiar Caña de pescar por Grebas de hierro
sailor.2: ¡Gracias! Nunca se tienen demasiadas cañas de pescar.
sailor.3: ¿Te hace falta hilo eh? Creo que el Druida, ahí arriba en el Manantial Esmeralda, vende de eso.
merchant2.d.g: Hola. Esa otra mercader me ha estado robando los clientes todo el día. ¡He oído que tiene más de un intercambio! Increíble.
merchant2.n.g: Buenas noches. No ha habido mucho negocio hoy. Al menos tú has venido.
merchant2.d.5: ¿Cómo es posible esto? Ese tío con un cubo en la cabeza me ha robado el sitio. ¡Increíble!
merchant2.n.5: Me estoy empezando a preocupar de que el cabezacubo nunca se irá de mi tienda.
merchant2.a1: Vender Cuero por un Lingote de hierro
cave_man.a2: Intercambiar Bacalao por Espada de hierro
soldier.d: La guerra es terrible, pero alguien tiene que salir ahí fuera y defender al resto. Me estoy tomando un respiro, debo volver en unas horas.
soldier.n: Me tengo que ir ahora, antes de que oscurezca más. La noche es peligrosa. Cualquier criatura puede estar al acecho, y atacar por la espalda sin aviso. He visto cosas terribles.
soldier.a1: Intercambiar Espada de piedra por Escudo
soldier.1: Siempre ayudaré a quien necesite equipamiento para defender la ciudad. La guerra no es ningun juego.
explorer.d.g: Estoy explorando las cuevas de esta región. Tienen millones de años de antiguedad, y ocultan numerosas historias. Ojalá me hubiera traído más antorchas. ¡Me he quedado sin!
explorer.n.g: Me estoy tomando un descanso. Llevo todo el día explorando estas cuevas. He encontrado muchas cosas interesantes, pero ojalá me hubiera traído más antorchas... ¡Me he quedado sin!
explorer.d.3: Estoy explorando el Infierno. Hay muchos misterios sin resolver por aquí, pero quiero investigarlos. Ojalá me hubiera traído más antorchas... ¡Me he quedado sin!
explorer.n.3: Me estoy tomando un respiro, aunque este aire no ayuda. Llevo todo el día rondando por el Infierno y he encontrado muchas cosas fascinantes. Eso sí, tendría que haber traído mas antorchas. ¡Me he quedado sin!
explorer.d.4: Estoy explorando el End. Hay muchos misterios sin resolver por aquí, pero quiero investigarlos. Ojalá me hubiera traído más antorchas... ¡Me he quedado sin!
explorer.n.4: Me estoy tomando un respiro, aunque este aire no ayuda. Llevo todo el día rondando por el End y he encontrado muchas cosas fascinantes. Eso sí, tendría que haber traído mas antorchas. ¡Me he quedado sin!
explorer.d.5: Hay aquí un muro de slime. Me he pasado varias horas intentando quitarlo pero no lo he conseguido. ¿Tienes algo que pueda ser útil?
explorer.n.5: Hay aquí un muro de slime. Me he pasado todo el día intentando quitarlo pero no lo he conseguido. ¿Tienes algo que pueda ser útil?
explorer.d2: Continuaré explorando en un rato. Gracias por la ayuda.
explorer.n2: Me iré a casa en un rato. Gracias por la ayuda.
explorer.d.7: Parece que hay un árbol bloqueando este pasaje. Si tuviera unas tijeras podría cortar las hojas para despejarlo.
explorer.n.7: Llevo todo el día intentando abrirme paso a través de este árbol, pero no lo conseguiré sin unas tijeras.
explorer.d.9: Me gustaría poder seguir explorando el mundo, pero los invasores podrían atacarme en cualquier momento. Espero que no destruyan nada más.
explorer.n.9: ¡Los invasores no son ninguna broma y podrían atacar en cualquier momento! ¡Mira lo que le han hecho a ese molino!
explorer.1: ¡Gracias! Ahora puedo continuar explorando. Toma, unas botas de hierro.
explorer.2: ¡Puedo usar esto para librarme del slime!
explorer.3: Estos cubos de madera no son muy duraderos. ¡Pero puedo hacer mella en el slime!
explorer.4: ¡Perfecto! ¡Por fin puedo explorar esta parte del mundo! ¡Explorar es genial! ¿A que sí?
explorer.5: ¡No, no, eso sería demasiado arriesgado! Podríamos quemar el bosque entero. ¿Como podría descubrir sus secretos entonces?
explorer.6: ¿Una amatista? Oh, como brilla esa amatista... Ehm... Podemos probar.
explorer.7: Ya está. Que conste que no me hago responsable de esto. Si algo sale mal, es culpa tuya.
explorer.a8: "¿Donde puedo conseguir un par de tijeras?"
explorer.8: Usa la cabeza, ve y explora. ¡Es la gracia de la vida! A ver, supongo que alguien que esté recogiendo flores tendrá unas.
explorer.9: ¡Gracias! Ahora puedo continuar explorando. Toma estas botas.
diver.d: Oh, no me esperaba que nadie me encontrara aquí abajo. Se me rompió el casco, pero justo me pude refugiar aquí antes de que entrara agua.
diver.n: Oh, ¿buceando por aquí tan tarde? ¡Já, supongo que te gusta tanto como a mí!
diver.d2: Al fin puedo salir. ¡Gracias, muy amable!
diver.n2: ¡Gracias por la redstone! Me sirvió para arreglar mi casco.
diver.d.9: ¡Oh no, nos atacan! ¡Hasta se han adueñado del barco!
diver.n.9: Oh no, oh no, is anyone doing anything to stop this?! I've not been able to calm down ever since I saw that Ilusionista on the barco this morning.
diver.a1: Trade Redstone for Casco de hierro
evoker.n: Don't even think that you can stay for the night! This is my place, not yours. Go back to the vertedero where you came from.
evoker.d.9: Have you seen this incredible ? I found it myself. I'm the best. I look like a real !
evoker.n.9: Don't even think that you can get my . It is mine, not yours.
evoker.a1: Buy Tótem de inmortalidad for One Oro
evoker.a1.1: Buy Tótem de inmortalidad for Bloque de oro
evoker.1.1: This is the easiest oro I've ever made! I get these totems for free, didn't you know?
evoker.3: If you want my incredible , you'll have to give me something equally amazing. How about you fetch me the Alcalde's !
evoker.4: I can't believe you gave me this incredible hat for that worthless !
mourner.d: ¿Por qué? ¿Por qué se tienen que ir? Solamente querría poder traerles de vuelta. No, menuda tontería. Ninguno volverá, nunca.
mourner.n2: The cementerio is such a peaceful place. I hope the dead also find their peace.
mourner.1: A... totem... is that possible? To resurrect? You don't know how much this means to me... here, have this bastón!
digger.n: People say being in the cementerio at night is scary! They think I'm crazy too. And I just like walking there, it's peaceful.
digger.1: That's a lovely . Perfect color! Beautiful...
baker.d.g: Welcome to the Panadería de la Hada Gorda! Here we bake the best galletas and tartas in the whole wide world!
baker.g.3: Oh no! My poor bakery... I’m glad that I still have some spare galletas that I can sell to get money for the repair.
baker.1: Here’s your galleta! Come back again!
baker.a2: "Can you bake me fresh pan with this ?"
baker.2: Yes, here we bake the best pan! Just come back in an hour and your pan should be ready!
baker.2.1: There you go, one piece of pan recién horneado!
baker.a3: Buy Tarta de calabaza for Three Oro
butcher.d: These conejos keep hopping and squeaking all over the place! Absolutely maddening!
butcher.n: Do conejos ever sleep? I can't sleep if they keep jumping all over me!
worker.d: What do you want? Open the door? Why should I do that? There's no reason to! Well, if I got some galletas or a nice new bow...
worker.2: This is a nice arco. Okay, I'll open it.
guard.1: Oh wow, I already feel so much better. I guess you want some type of reward? Here, take this gate llave. I think it's used for the gate in the forest.
apple.d: Manzanas! Manzanas! Aah, I just love manzanas! Manzanas for everyone!
carrot.d: Zanahorias! Zanahorias! Aah, I just love zanahorias! Zanahorias for everyone!
carrot.1: I've never been better! Zanahorias! Zanahorias! I just love zanahorias!
carrot.2: Oh, don't worry. This is just my Halloween costume. Do you also want a zanahoria? The color and smell of zanahorias is just astounding. I love zanahorias.
carrot.a3: Give Arco, Calavera de esqueleto and three Flechas
carrot.3: Thank you! This costume is even better than the one I had! I did take all of the Granjero's zanahorias for my old costume, so I guess you can have them now...
brother.d.7: Puff puff, I am a pez globo, hehe. I was going to go trick or treating, but I can’t find my sister. Maybe if I find a present for her, she will show up. Do you have anything?
brother.d.9: I like costumes, and with a good enough one you could probably sneak past the Invasores at the destilería. I'm too scared to try it myself, though.
brother.n.9: I wonder if the Invasores could be fooled with a costume. It's probably too late to try it now, though.
brother.1: Thank you! You can have some of my azúcar. I already ate a lot of it anyway!
skeleton.d: Would you like some flechas? In your body.
mayor.d: Hello! I am the second alcalde of .
mayor.n: Good evening! It's nice being the alcalde of this town, but sometimes there's just too much to do...
mayor.1: Of course! Help is always appreciated here. You just need to get some ladrillos from the shed next to the old alcaldes grave. Here's the llave to open it. Don’t lose it!
mayor.2: Want to play a game of ? I am the best player in this town, and I bet my hat you can't get one of your white pieces onto the other side before me.
mayor.6: Ha! I get to keep my title of the best  player in town!
mayor.d.9: Hello! Due to the invasión, we can't open the gates today. Luckily, the invasores can't get past these walls.
mayor.n.9: Good evening! The invasores still aren't gone. Hopefully, they will give up soon.
astronomer.a1: "Within three hours, a meteorito will come down."
astronomer.1: If there was a meteorito, I would have already seen it in my telescope. Stop lying. I was just about to give you my valuable pet, but I am not giving it to a liar.
astronomer.5: The meteorito has already crashed today an hour after noon! Stop lying to me, I do not have time for this! You could have gotten my pet, but I am not giving it to a liar.
thief.d: Hey, listen! You better not tell anyone that you saw me here. I'll give you a poción if you keep quiet.
thief.n: Shh! Do not tell anyone I was here, okay? I'll give you a poción if you don't!
pigman.g: I know because I live here. I wouldn't suggest being around here without a cuerpo ignífugo poción. Humans, like you, tend to burn...
pigman.g3: If you want to get past this gate you will have to find another path.
pigman.g4: The El Nether is a dangerous place.
pigman.1: You have a moneda de blaze? Go ahead and use the gate, then.
pigman.2: You can give me a moneda de blaze, and I'll let you through. Here in the El Nether, we use them as a form of payment, but they need to be forged like any other coin. No, I don't know how to do that myself.
pigman.3: Why would you want to? Humans, like you, tend to burn... but, perhaps a lavagante is what you're looking for.
wife.n.7: Hey! Enjoying the night, or is it too spooky? Remember not to stay up all night, or the scary zombis will come and get you.
wife.n.9: Oh my goodness! Why hasn't someone stopped the invasión already?
assassin.a2: Kill a Blaze for Seven Oro
rose.d: I really enjoy s; their color and their smell are just astounding! The only problem is that s are not edible, and I am getting a bit hungry.
rose.n: s look so beautiful in the light of the moon. We should really appreciate them more. The only problem is that s are not edible, and I haven’t eaten all day.
rose.d2: I really enjoy s; their color and their smell are just astounding!
rose.n2: s look so beautiful in the light of the moon. We should really appreciate them more.
rose.1: Oh, how nice of you. I can use this to make some zanahoria stew. You can have my  cutter tijeras. Hopefully, you will put it to good use.
time_traveller.d: I really need to get back to my own time, this place is so primitive! I really wish I knew how to get back. Maybe one of those green gemstones… what were they called again… esmeraldas! Yeah, maybe one of those could be used for my time travelling machine?
time_traveller.n: This place is so boring and primitive! I could be home now, watching the Shrooball game on my televisor. Maybe one of those green gemstones could get me home? Esmeraldas, I believe they are called?
time_traveller.1: I’ve never seen one of these in person, I’ve only seen them in museums. Interesting. I guess I’ll be able to use this. You can take this poción. It’s quite good at keeping people awake, and it even tastes like manzanas.
graveyard.g2: What? But... but I got a !
graveyard.1: Ah, what's this? Orders from the Alcalde? Let me see!
marhjo.d: Excuse me? Uhm, not to annoy you, but are you able to help me with something? As you can see, I've been in a... ehmm... "work" accident. Can you bring me a pala?
marhjo.n: Help me... I've been stuck in this pile since 3:±±! Can you bring me a pala, please?
mctsts.1: Oh, you have my repeater! Take this peto de diamante!
ttextt.1: Oh, a new rhythm to listen to? Here, you can have my casco for that!
ghast.g: The El Nether is now under my protection!
hermit.d.1: The other day, I heard that something happened in the mine. It was a grava cave-in. There must be something behind it.
hermit.n.1: There was a grava cave-in in the mines, but right now it's probably too late to check it out...
hermit.d.g: Last night, I read the stars, and according to them, a comet will land near  one hour after noon. I could be wrong though.
hermit.1: Thank you! Here, take this poción. I'll go plant my hundredth tree now!
hermit.2: Good, you're starting to learn! Now, take this tinte amarillo.
dockmaster.d: One time, there was an accident where Ricardo was stuck in my balloon for over two days. Ricardo has never been the same since that day.
dockmaster.2: Hmm, if you want a ride, I would need some fuel. I think 16 carbón would do.
checkminer.n: I haven't eaten all day, except my three breakfasts, four lunches, and two dinners. Oh, and five slices of tarta, of course.
mrk.1: Thanks! Here, have these pants. What? I can't even understand this language... this libro is boring too!
mrk.2: Thanks! Here, have these pants. What? This libro is boring too!
ghost_queen.d: Come along with me to the cementerio!
ghost_queen.d2: Hello, my dear... I have come from beyond. I am the . One of my sweet spirits has asked for you!
ghost_queen.n: Have you talked to  yet? He has grave news for you...
ghost2.d: Life as a  is so boring. I'm happy the Queen plays with us sometimes, though.
ghost2.n: The Queen is like a mother to us. She takes care of all of us s.
ghost_mayor.d: Hello! I used to be the alcalde of Glarthford.
ghost_mayor.n: Good evening! It was nice being alcalde of this town, but being a  is a lot less work...
viktor.d: How is it possible for a man such as  to take over a whole kingdom by himself?
viktor.n: You need to fight ! So much of Tharros is nothing but a pile of ashes now. The same fate will befall  if you do not hurry!
percival.1: Greetings, adventurer. I am King  the First of Tharros. Once, my kingdom was peaceful and prosperous, rich beyond your imagination, the biggest kingdom of the world. But now... so much of it is nothing but ruins and ashes. I have come to warn you...
percival.2: About a decade ago, a criminal came from across the Océano Susurrante, . He impersonated my son and killed me. Before, the kingdom had blossomed, but once he took over, everything changed for the worse. My wife, , started a resistance, , but alas, eventually they were all killed as well. I've come to bring you grave news.
percival.3: will not stop with Tharros! He wants an empire of ruins, the whole world. You %s stop him! Promise me! You must find three of the elemental s to create a weapon that is powerful enough to stop the monster  has become!
percival.a4: Give Espada de diamante and Three s
percival.4: Here, a weapon powerful enough to defeat . Only you can end this suffering now. Be strong, be brave!
helene.d: killed every member of our resistance, . We tried to stop him, we really did...
helene.1: Unfortunately, I cannot help you much, but I do know that an ordinary human being would not be able to handle the power of the s.
slime.3: Go, my slime! Stick, stick! Stick them to the ground!
ender_priest.3: The End Disease is better than the 'great' invasion!
ender_priest.l2: You can't get through this . Don't bother trying!
ender_priest.l3: Alright, you broke my . Now come and fight me!
netheran.i: Haha! You want to fight me? You stand no chance! Maybe I will fight you if you can defeat my two blazes!
blaze1.n: has ordered me to guard the El Nether. I won't let you past me!
citizen.d.2: This is dreadful! What, haven't you heard? The  stole the fireworks we were going to use for the parade! I heard he lives in a cave near the Cascada Esmeralda!
citizen.n.2: Dear me, it's getting late. I fear we aren't going to get the fireworks from the  in time! Someone has to get to the cave urgently!
citizen.d.3: I heard that the Maestro Destilero is making cuerpo ignífugo pocións today. With all of these fires, it might be worth checking out.
citizen.n.3: The Maestro Destilero sold cuerpo ignífugo pocións today, but I doubt you can still get into the destilería this late.
citizen.d.5: The Astrónomo keeps rambling about some meteoritos? I fear he may have gone insane.
citizen.n.5: Good evening! Have you seen the Astrónomo recently? He's up in his Observatorio rambling about meteoritos. Maybe somebody should check on him.
citizen.d.7: Apparently, the  has some sort of ancient key? He’s not sure what it's for, but surely it must be important. Oh, and I nearly forgot: Happy Halloween!
citizen.n.7: Yesterday the  showed me this strange ancient key. I wonder what it is... I would ask him, but it's Halloween!
citizen.d.9: Dear me, the Saqueadors have turned the windmill into their outpost!
citizen.n.9: This is dreadful! The invasión still hasn't been stopped!
uncle.d.2: Good day! You know, there’s a thing that’s been troubling me for a while now. I keep hearing weird noises every time I go sit by the Cascada Esmeralda. I know I sound mad but I swear it’s as if someone’s up there...
uncle.n.2: Good evening! I’m having some trouble sleeping. I just can’t stop thinking about the Cascada Esmeralda. I swear someone is up there. I wish I could go see for myself, but my knees are too feeble to get up there.
uncle.d.4: I think this is it. The disease has taken all my strength, I can't go any further. You must save the others from it. Promise me you will. I know the Granjero has access to the Brecha Gélida. I believe the source of the disease lies in there. Go, now!
uncle.n.4: I- just go! Go to the Brecha Gélida... I'll be fine. I’m always fine.
uncle.d.5: Nasty business, this. A slime came from the volcán anciano and polluted much of the food! The volcano can be accessed by diving into the lago, but nobody has been brave enough yet...
uncle.n.5: If we don't do anything soon, the slime will come back... and maybe he might not just pollute the food this time...
uncle.e.6: What a terrible occurrence! All of this reminds me of what happened only a couple of years ago, over in the forest at Castillo del Ascenso. Nasty business.
uncle.d.7: Hello there. Have you seen the observatorio? I’ve been told that the Halloween decoration is marvelous up there!
uncle.n.7: Halloween night is great! Have you been up to the observatorio? The decoration is amazing, I’ve heard.
uncle.e.8: Thank you. Your poción saved my life!
uncle.d.9: The Maestro Destilero managed to escape the destilería safe and sound. Sadly, the  was killed by the invasores, and I doubt anyone besides a pillager can enter the destilería now.
uncle.d.8: Hello there. Earlier today I was in the el nether, for... reasons... anyway, that's not important. However, I got into an accident as you can probably see. Could you make me a regeneración poción using a lágrima de ghast?
uncle.n.8: Good evening! I'm starting to hurt quite... quite a bit. Could you make me a regeneración poción using a lágrima de ghast?
grimsbane.d: I have destroyed Tharros! Do you really think you are worthy of fighting me?
grimsbane.l: How? This doesn't make any sense! I destroyed Tharros! How could you beat me?
pufferfish.2: Puff! Baby back! Puff! Yes! Puff! Take Esponja!
pufferfish.g2: Puff! Observatorio friend! Puff. Saw . Puff!
pufferfish_red.d: Puff! Met friend? Puff! In lago! Puff.
pufferfish_red.n: Puff! Evening. Puff. Lago friend. Puff!
pufferfish_red.g2: Puff! Scary grim man! Puff! Hiding nearby. Puff.  can help! Puff!
ent.d: Greetings. I do not have time to talk now. Something terrible has happened! A branch of the  has been cut off. This is unacceptable.
ent.n: I do not know how we will ever calm the  down! Why can the mortals not leave us in peace? We have been here longer than anyone.
ent.d2: Greetings. Hast thou returned the  to the ?
ent.n2: Hast the  calmed down? Why can the mortals not leave us in peace?
ent_king.d: I do not wish to talk with you mortals! One of your younglings stole a  of mine! Thou hast no idea what kind of power the  holds within it!
ent_king.n: A mortal dared to plunder a  of mine! I shall not allow this behaviour!
ent_king.n2: Thank thee for thy effort in finding my . Thou hast proven to me that not all mortals are narrow.
ent_king.1: Yes, thou hast returned it! I shall destroy this before anyone can receive my powers from it. I shall evermore be in thy debt. The  of the earth is thine!
ent_king.2: Hmm... the , thou speak of? The magick Membrane of Fantasma mayhaps is what thou seek. Yes, such substance can reveal even the most hidden of entities. We live in terrible times, however. My young entlings have such trouble growing. I cannot help but to expect something in return. Bring me dusted bones of a esqueleto, and I shall lend you it. Mayhaps a Granjero would know how to dust the huesos of a esqueleto.
ent_king.3: I thank thee. Thou may use my Membrane to reveal the secrets. Hold it near where thou believe the  hides.
sprite.d: I keep injuring my wings, but I can never find enough plumas to fix them...
sprite.n: I wish my plumas grew faster so that I wouldn't need to search for plumas to fix my wings...
sprite.n2: Thanks for the plumas! I just wish my wings grew faster...
sprite.g3: Oh, no!  saw the , and, well, he fled. I, I didn't see where he went, I was too busy, umm, taking care of my wings… some of the other holders of the essences surely saw him, though! Maybe the  in the lago? Or the  in the forest!
sprite.1: I can fly well again! My wing doesn't hurt anymore! The  of air is yours!
demon.d: This druid fool has got no clue what he's doing! I felt a weak summoning and decided to check it out. But no, it’s not a big powerful druid, it’s just another foolish child testing out sacred summoning rituals. The worst thing is that I can't get back home, because I'm all out of polvo de blaze!
demon.n: Oh, c'mon, I'm so sick of this! I have to sit here watching this idiot try and summon me because I'm out of polvo de blaze and can’t go home.
bucketm.e: The fire is gone! The cubo de maderas save the day once again!
bucketm.d: The other mercader was kind enough to lend me his stand, so now I am here. I sell buckets. The best cubos: cubo de maderas!
bucketm.n: I like evenings, and it only gets better with cubo de maderas.
bucketm.1: A perfect cubo takes a bit of time to make. Give me an hour and I will have a beautiful cubo de madera ready!
bucketm.2: Always a pleasure to supply the world with cubo de maderas!
bucketm.3: You might want to look around at the lago. Water creatures often carry esponjas around, but maybe I can draw your interest to a cubo de madera instead?
bowm.d: Hello there, can I interest you in a new ballesta? This one has a very sturdy foregrip and the hilo has been made from the finest silk!
bowm.n: Good evening, you look like someone who could use a ballesta. This one has a sturdy foregrip and the hilo has been made from the finest silk! The durability is excellent!
bowm.d.9: Hello there. I was going to buy this old stand, but everyone is distracted by the invasión.
bowm.n.9: Good evening. You look like someone who could use a couple of fine flechas! I was going to sell a few, but because of the invasión, I can't buy this stand yet.
bowm.2: Here you go, the finest flecha gold can buy!
bowm.3: You don’t know how to use a arco? Let me show you!
bowm.4: You don’t seem to own a arco, and I don’t have any spare ones. Maybe you'd like to purchase a ballesta instead?
bowm.5: You don't seem to own a arco, and I don't have any spare ones. Maybe another time?
bowm.tbc1: Puedes usar tu arco siempre y cuando tengas flechas. Te he dado unas cuantas, ¡prueba a ver qué tal!
bowm.tbc2: Después de elegir qué arco quieres usar, verás aparecer una flecha. Selecciónala usando click derecho lo más rápido que puedas! Al hacerlo, aparecerá otra.
bowm.tbc3: Tienes un tiempo limitado, y hacer click de forma incorrecta tan solo lo acortará, así que ten cuidado! Huye cuando hayas acabado de entrenar.
bowm.tbc4: Recuerda huir cuando hayas acabado de entrenar.
drowned.n: The lago is one of my favorite places in the evening... not that I could go anywhere else...
creeper.d: Tssss... hey! I almost managed to sneak up on the Leñador...
spigman.d: This is not the El Nether...? Whatever... die!
miller.d: Hey! Are you in need of some ? The mill is running, but I wish the wind would pick up a bit. A nice big storm would be perfect, don’t you think?
miller.d.9: I hope the invasores cannot reach me here, otherwise I’d be screwed!
miller.n.9: How can those citizens stay outside at a time like this?! They should take shelter just like me. The invasores could sneak up on us at any time!
miller.a1: "Can you grind this trigo for me?"
miller.1b: Yeah, sure! It's quite windy, so I think I can have your  ready in about an hour.
miller.1c: Of course! Haven't seen this much wind in  for a long time. Your  should only take around 2± minutes now.
monk.d: The cura once told me that the santo grial was lost. The truth is, I mistook that old thing for junk and gave it to the mendigo at the vertedero. Bless his soul.
monk.d.9: I hope the invasores didn't find the santo grial while raiding the vertedero, or who knows what punishment will be sent!
monk.n.9: The invasores should be asleep right now, but I doubt those evil-doers will sleep.
monk.1: There is a vertedero north-west of the town. The old mendigo has lived there most of his life.
miner_chief.d: Do you see that patch of diorita over there? Yeah, I've been trying to break through it all day. I wasn't very successful, as you can see… maybe Dinamita could do the trick?
miner_chief.n: I'm getting tired, but I'm not giving up yet. There has to be a way to break through that diorita. Maybe with Dinamita?
miner_chief.g2: The wall is open, but there's nothing here except murciélagos! What a waste of our time! I hope they stay in there because I just can't stand being near them.
miner_chief.d.9: I doubt the invasores could reach my mine due to that grava cave-in, but better safe than sorry!
miner_chief.n.9: I'm not afraid of those invasores, but this late in the night it's better if I hide from the murciélagos.
miner_chief.a1: "Where could I get the necessary items for Dinamita?"
miner_chief.1: Down the vagoneta track there's a pólvora storage. But I’m afraid to enter it... it’s filled with murciélagos! There might also be some arena around here, but it’s no use without a proper tool to gather it.
miner_chief.2: Thank you! This should take care of the diorita.
miner_chief.tbc1: Para vencer a la Emperatriz Murciélago, debemos enfrentarnos a ella por turnos. Por algún extraño motivo, el tiempo parece detenerse mientras estamos en combate.
miner_chief.tbc2: Durante tu turno, usa tu hotbar para navegar por los menús. Para escoger una opción, usa click derecho. Prueba a usar un ataque 'Cuerpo a cuerpo'!
miner_chief.tbc3: Parece que no tienes ningún arma. No pasa nada, puedo prestarte mi pico de piedra.
miner_chief.tbc4: Cuidado! Ha llegado el turno enemigo.
miner_chief.tbc5: Eso sí, no todo son malas noticias. ¿Ves el hierro en tu hotbar? Significa que puedes bloquear este ataque. Cuando se transforme en lingotes, usa click derecho y evitarás recibir daño.
miner_chief.tbc6: Ah, parece que viene a por mí. ¡Mantente alerta!
miner_chief.tbc7: ¡Mecachis! ¡No dejes que sus espejismos te confundan!
miner_chief.tbc8: Si haces click derecho en un enemigo con la etiqueta que tienes en tu hotbar, podrás cambiar el objetivo de tus ataques.
miner_chief.tbc9: Los ataques 'Cuerpo a cuerpo' no son más que una de tus opciones. Otros tipos de ataque, como los que usan 'Magia', son más difíciles de ejecutar.
miner_chief.tbc10: Prueba a usar mi bastón antiguo. Tras seleccionarlo en el menú de 'Magia', haz click derecho tantas veces como puedas para atacar.
miner_chief.tbc11: Puedes obtener bastones al final de algunos combates. Al usarlos, aplicarán diferentes efectos, pudiendo dañar a más de un enemigo.
miner_chief.tbc12: Puedes consultar los efectos de cada ataque en tu inventario, pasando el cursor sobre el objeto correspondiente.
miner_chief.tbc13: A parte de la barra de salud, también tienes que tener en mente tu energía. Todo ataque requiere algo de energía, que se regenera poco a poco. Para acelerar el proceso, puedes comer lo que lleves en tu 'Bolsa'.
miner_chief.tbc14: Si te quedas sin energía, puedes dejar pasar tu turno desde el menú de 'Opciones'. Al tener mucha energía, podrás regenerar salud. ¡Lo que puede hacer una buena alimentación!
miner_chief.tbc15: Para terminar, ten en cuenta que los enemigos pueden esquivar tus ataques, sobre todo si usas armas débiles.
gunpowder_warden.d: Pólvora? No, I can't give you any! Well, clean this mess of webs up, and I might give you some.
gunpowder_warden.n: What do you want this late? Pólvora? Alright, clean these webs and I might give you some!
gunpowder_warden.1: Fine, here’s your pólvora! Now get lost!
bat.l: No! My murciélagos will avenge me!
bat.1: Murciélagos! Come and defend your Empress!
sorcerer.1: Very well. It ends here then. But, remember: todavía quedan muchas historias que contar!
ender_guard3.g: Aivadot nadeuq sahcum sairotsih euq ratnoc.
ender_guard6.g: Tahw era uoy gniod ereh?! Era uoy gniyrt ot retne eht 's noisnam?
ender_guard8.g: Uoy'er ton na Namredne, era uoy?
akid.d: This is my waiting spot. Sorry, can’t move. I have to stand right here, nowhere else. I’m waiting for my best friend in the whole world! I can unlock the shed for you if you have the llave, but I still won’t move.
cedric.cut2: My master, the , and I were trying out a rather new and unstable spell, and because of me and my clumsiness, I destroyed everything.
necromancer.l: H-how! I shouldn’t have been able to be defeated like this. I am the ! You won… this time...
necromancer.cut1: Oh, look who is here! My 'beloved' apprentice, , who was so kind to get us all killed! Now you get to feel how we all felt!
necromancer.cut3: Someone is still here? I thought they would have tried to escape by now, but I guess they have a death wish! You are joining  then!
maid.d: What is going on? My body feels weak, like I’ve been asleep for years, but it was just the other day that I was preparing dinner for the  and , wasn’t it?
maid.n: The  took care of the s and butlers like we were family… I can’t imagine him turning evil...
grandma.d: Hello there, young one. I hope you are having a marvelous day! I was planning to collect some manzanas today, but, oh, I am so tired.
grandma.d2: That poción you gave me was wondrous! Do you have any more?
grandma.n2: I do not think I will fall asleep before I get home tonight. Thank you for the lovely poción, dear!
grandma.1: Oh my, what is this wondrous drink? It tastes like manzanas… oh my! What is this rush I am feeling? I feel like I could stay awake for weeks! Here, have my old . I won't need them for the time being!
zombie_villager.g: I used to be a bibliotecario. Now, a chapter of my life may have ended, but it's not the end of my story.
ender_zombie.d: They call me the , for I am the end of all things!
zombie_s2.g: You know what? I reckon, I reckon, that if you went over to that calabaza-headed one over there. Yeah, the one who's pretending to be a calabaza? I reckon she's got something nice for you. I think she's got a good treat. I reckon she's got something. Yeah. That'd be fun.
pzombie.n: You probably thought I was a calabaza, but I am actually a deadly zombi!
snowman.d: Hey, you! Could you maybe help me? I lost my nose, and I, uh, can’t find a suitable replacement for it! Could you get me a zanahoria? I am too scared of melting to go look for one myself...
snowman.d2: Thanks for the zanahoria! Now I look like a real !
snowman.n2: Thanks for the zanahoria! Now I look like a real ! And, I'm looking forward to showing it off tomorrow!
snowman.1: Oh, wow! This zanahoria’s a great nose! I have this espada that I, well, kinda tried to use as a nose… you can guess how that went. You’re so nice, so why don’t you take it.
skeleton2.d: I bet you can’t even dodge a bola de nieve! Now try to dodge this!
skeleton2.n: Good evening! Would you like an flecha… in your face?
magma_cube.d: You couldn’t even beat a normal slime if you tried! Now try to beat me!
sleepless_m.n: Oh I got it! Those so-called people aren't really people! They're actually zombis! But to be honest, I don't care, please quiet them down, I just want to sleep.
sleepless_m.1: Finally, some silence! At least now I can peacefully fail to sleep. Uh, here, you can have this... uh, espada. It has some green goo on it that I can't get off... careful with that, I guess.

adri.1: Oh wow! You have a dog? Unbelievable! Could I have him? Right now I'd give anything in the world to have a dog, even my most treasured ballesta.
adri.2: Really?! You mean it?! This has been by far the best thing that has happened to me since I entered this godforsaken cave! Here, have my master ballesta, but be careful, it's quite tricky to use. And treat it well!
adri.animal.cruelty: What did you just do? Get out of here right now, you monster! I still have plenty of ballestas to shoot you with!
villager.d: Yes, I'm also a raider! Oh, wait... you're not one of them, are you? You see, I noticed a  taking some of their oro before... maybe he's still around.
villager.n: Yes, I'm also a raider! Oh, wait... You're not one of them, are you? You see, this morning a  took some of their oro... it was a while ago, but maybe he's still around.
gibbs.1: Oh, a tooth. Thank you! That works. In return, you can have my . Don't ask how I got it... there was an accident.
gibbs.quickfast: Oh, I see, so you do know. Well, I guess, uh, I should give you this bee staff anyway, because I'm not entirely sure what the consequences would be if I didn't. Uh, oh yeah, also, I've been wondering, do you have any influence over these s?
gibbs.quickfast.later: I've been wondering, do you have any influence over these s?
gibbs.quickfast.reply.2: I see. Hmm. Well, prove it to me. Make it that festival time. And, collect a . I'll be waiting up at the statue. Just go to the tower and look at me with a catalejo or something and I'll come to you.
gibbs.tbc1: If you were to die right now, would that fix this ?
suso.g: Oh, someone's here. I need... a fish. Yeah. You see, I used to be a gato. You'd be surprised with the kinds of magic some people practice around here. Anyways, would you be so kind to bring me a fish to eat?
suso.gary.3: What is everyone doing here? Is this some sort of cult? Can't a gato just hide in peace?
jerozgen.d: I'm usually busy translating old books for the Astrónomo, but today there hasn't been any work. If you need anything translated, just let me know!
jerozgen.2: There you go! It seems to be a small collection of .
jerozgen.a2: "Go to the sewers, or I'll burn down the Observatorio"
evil_ts.1: What is happening here? This isn't Capítulo II, what are you doing here?
evil_ts.tbc4.a: You being here in Capítulo X is fundamentally incompatible with how a playthrough of this map should reasonably operate. This is a Capítulo II area!
federick.d: Hmm, what a bunch of creeps, standing around in this fog with zombi costumes on! I'd laugh if one turned out to be real.
federick.n: The dusk has started to make me hallucinate. I could've sworn I just saw a person with a zombi costume attack someone...?!
pillager1.d: 'Was told not to drink any of that - tastes so good! Said don't drink no cerveza, is what he said.
pillager1.n: Cerveza's good. Do ya want some?
pillager2.d: The destilería is now ours! Soon, we will rule everything!
pillager2.n: This invasión is going well. When the sun rises again, we will be victorious.
pillager3.d: That barco would be perfect for my honeymoon!
pillager4.d: Such a perfect place to invasión! Look at all those manzanas!
pillager4.n: I can't believe we didn't invasión this place earlier!
pillager_s1.d: I don't know how to use a ballesta, could you maybe give me your weapon?
pillager_s1.n: It's getting late and I couldn't do anything today. I don't even know how to use a ballesta...
pillager_s1.1: Thank you! Finally, I can help! Here, take my ballesta!
pillager_s2.d: Good day! I'm the new Granjero here!
pillager_s2.n: Oi, I'm the new Granjero! What are you doing here at this time?
pillager_s3.d: This  attacked me and stole all my coins! He ran towards the farm... someone has to stop him! I just cannot stand this sort of criminal behavior.
pillager_s3.n: This morning a  stole all my coins. He ran towards the farm, but nobody has tracked him down yet! I have no respect for criminals.
illusioner1.d: The lago is so pretty! What a shame that it's all frozen, so we can't move the barco.
illusioner1.n: Even at night, I like the view at the lago. Sadly, we can't move the barco because the lago is frozen.
illusioner_s.d: Apiarios are amazing for raiding! I can throw them around!
illusioner_s.n: I would've already taken the apiario, but those abejas… they could sting me at any time!
illusioner_s.g2: Where did the apiario go?! I was going to use it for the invasión...
illusioner_s.a1: ☠ "Can you teach me how to throw a apiario?" ☠
illusioner_s.1: You don't know how to throw a apiario? Well, I should probably be killing you, but I can't miss this chance to teach you!
illusioner_s.tbc1: Los ataques arrojadizos de permiten usar una variedad de objetos a tu favor. Por ejemplo, una colmena. Sin embargo, la mayor parse de estos se pueden usar tan sólo una vez. Menudo desperdicio.
illusioner_s.tbc2: Tras elegir con qué objeto atacar, tu hotbar se llenará de bloques coloridos. A partir de entonces, pulsar click derecho sumará o restará una cantidad de daño a tu ataque dependiendo del color resaltado en ese momento.
illusioner_s.tbc3: El bloque verde aumenta mucho el poder de tu ataque, mientras que los naranjas lo hacen en menor medida. Sin embargo, los bloques rojos empeoran tu ataque, ¡y de menuda manera!
illusioner_s.tbc4: Este ataque puede ser devastador, pero hace falta algo de habilidad para ejecutarlo. Sería una pena echar a perder una valiosa colmena entrenando. En su lugar, te he dado un par de huevos para que pruebes con ellos.
illusioner_s.tbc5: Es divertido, ¿verdad? Lo mejor es hacer click tantas veces como puedas en los bloques verdes y naranjas... Si ya has visto suficiente, sería un buen momento para irse.
illusioner_s.tbc6: Si ya has terminado, será mejor que huyas. No me gustaría tener que acabar contigo.
illusioner_s.tbc7: Me lo he pasado bien enseñándote, pero creo que ha llegado la hora de despedirse. No me digas que no te avisé.
vindicator1.d: Nothing gives me more strength than the sound of soporte para pocioness in the morning.
vindicator1.n: I told my friend downstairs to not drink any cerveza, next thing he does is drink it. How is he supposed to guard now?
vindicator2.d: This vertedero is such a mess! I hope we can still find some treasures in it.
vindicator2.n: This vertedero is so messy, but at least it’s not as overgrown as the forest.
vindicator3.d: You may not enter the vertedero! This is our camp now.
vindicator3.n: Don't think you can sneak past me in the darkness. The vertedero is our camp now!
vindicator_s.d: The Ermitaña said that a meteorito was going to strike in this forest before she ran away, but who cares!
vindicator_s.d2: The meteorito did strike at 13:±±! She was right after all! Well, I guess this is a good sign for our next invasión!
vindicator_s.n: At least the meteorito lights up this place! Fire is great in invasións.
bannerman_illusioner.d: You're telling me you want my ? Well, you can have it. But first, you'll have to defeat me!
bannerman_illusioner.n: Do you think I'm too tired to fight at night? Shame on you, because you can't have my  even at this time!
bannerman_pillager.d: The air is so fresh up here... but you want my ? Well, I'd like to see you try!
bannerman_pillager.n: What a starry night, I feel like I could touch the moon. Oh, you want my ? Well, I'd like to see you try!
bannerman_vindicator.d: As long as our leader is alive, I'll never give up my duty to protect the !
bannerman_vindicator.n: You want my ? It may be getting late, but as long as our leader is alive we'll never give up, and you won't get my !
pillager_guard1.d: Halt! I can't allow you to enter. Nobody may enter the destilería while the invasión is in progress.
pillager_guard1.n: Halt! It's late, but the invasión is still in progress. Nobody may enter the destilería.
pillager_guard1.1: I'm not allowed to let anyone in! The only way anyone is getting into the destilería is if they break-in. Luckily for me, you don't look like much of a . Funnily enough, that Saqueador over there near the ruins actually got attacked by a  earlier.
pillager_guard2.d: I'm guarding the . Only his  may enter, and you're clearly not one.
pillager_guard2.n: It's night-time, but I'm always guarding the . If you're not a , you have to stay out.
pillager_guard2.1: Of course. I would never let a  wait.
pillager_guard2.1x: Definitely not. You don't have a familiar face, a ballesta, or even a . Any real  would possess all three.
pillager_guard2.1x2: Definitely not. Any real  would possess a familiar face, a ballesta, and a .
pillager_advisor2.n: Perhaps you should call the  to help you out, because you stand no chance against our captain, haha!
ender_architect.g: I tsuj dehsinif gnidliub siht ! Ti lliw evas su morf gnillaf otni eht diov!
ender_merchant.1: Thank you! Here, take this Fruta coral as a reward!
enderman_s1.g: Hi. I have a problem. The shulkers keep teleporting all over el end! Unbelievable and absolutely maddening!
enderman_s1.1: Impressive! That's one less shulker in the world. Here, take this!
enderman_s2.g: Why, why do I have to be so bored. Some fruta coral would be so much fun right now. No, that's nonsense. I don't have any with me...

piglin1.g.8: Ooh, what a fancy armor! Welcome to the El Nether, friend!
piglin2.g: Hey, there! Thanks again for helping me with the ghast earlier!
piglin2.g2: That tótem de inmortalidad is so cool! I think I want to see the overworld myself!
piglin2.g3: I convinced the others to go visit the overworld! I still can't believe tótem de inmortalidads are real!
piglin2.g4: Is this where you are going to save your ? This is so exciting!
piglin2.a: Go away! I'm busy with my new lágrima de ghast!
piglin2.1: Thanks for killing that ghast for me! This lágrima de ghast is now mine!
piglin2.a2: "My 's injured and to survive he needs a lágrima de ghast!"
piglin2.4: Fine. Here, in the El Nether we sometimes find manzana doradas. They are rare magical golden items! If you can bring me something similar, but from the overworld, I might change my mind.
piglin4.g: Welcome! I heard you helped the little one with that ghast, that was lurking around here! We really appreciate your help!
piglin5.g: Hello there! Some of the other residents of the El Nether are pretty unfriendly, but you don't have to worry about that with us!
piglin8.a: An outsider! Who do you think you are, walking around here? I'm going to show you what we do to your kind in the El Nether!
piglin7.g: I can't believe he lied! He told me he's from the El Nether, but in reality, he's from the overworld! And now, to make matters worse, my little boy ran off to stab him with a knife!
piglin7.1: There is that one piglin that may be of help to you. The others don't like him, so he stays away. I think he sometimes is at 's place.
piglin6.g: Welcome to the El Nether! If you've already met the other piglins, ignore them! Those guys only talk with people in full gold armor and they kicked me out because I'm friendly to everyone!
piglin6.a1: Trade  for three pieces of Golden Armor
piglin6.1: Thanks! I haven't had some good  in a while. Those other piglins won't let me go near them or the hoglins. Here, you can have this golden armor!

tip1: Tip: Haz click en la cabeza de un personaje con la mano vacía para interactuar con él.
tip2: Tip: Intercambia y roba objetos para prepararte para los combates.
tip3: Tip: Usando una poción temporal, puedes viajar una hora hacia el pasado.
tip4: Tip: A faro shows where you need to go!
tip7: Tip: By using s, you can travel forwards in time by one hour! This way, you can skip wait times.
tip8: Tip: By using s, you can cause a storm. This affects the world in several ways.
tip10: Tip: Remember to follow the faro!
tip11: Tip: All capítulos (other than the tutorial) take place in the same world. Many of the things you learn will be useful more than once!
tip15: Tip: Some items, like a llave, are items that characters probably won't give to you willingly. You can, however, steal from them while they are asleep! You should see if anyone in the town is asleep in the mornings!
tip19: Tip: In fights, always try to keep your energía as high as possible! This allows you to regenerate, which is very important!
tip21: Tip: Press %s to see a map of the world!
tip22: Tip: Don't forget that you can see a map by pressing %s!
tip24: Tip: Make sure you have Voces y diálogos and  enabled in the settings!
tip25: Tip: Trading with the  is never necessary, though occasionally helpful. He simply provides alternative ways to get certain items!
tip26: Tip: Don't forget to block by right-clicking when the Pepita de hierros turn into Lingote de hierros!
tip30: Tip: Don't forget about the faro!
tip32: Tip: In the 'Options' section, you can find several other useful functions. Use Armadura and Objetos pasivos to see more information about additional combat items. Use  to see which tamed animals will help you in combat. Use Frecuencia de ataques and Tipos elementales for more information about enemies!
tip33: Tip:  are animals you have tamed in the world. Your strongest companion will help you during combat.
tip34: Tip: Here you can see the frecuencia de ataque of all participants of a fight. Participants with a higher frequency get more turns. You can increase your own frecuencia de ataque with pocións!
tip35: Tip: Here you can see a list of effects enemies are strong (S) and weak (W) against. For example, a Bastón ígneo will do considerably more damage against an enemy who is weak against fire than to an enemy who isn't. Enemies that are strong against fire will take very little damage from it and won't be set on fire. This affects all of the damage of all weapons that also apply an effect.
tip36: Tip: Items like Velocidad Pocións can be used in combat to attack more often!
tip37: Tip: Most bastóns are elemental weapons. Their name lists the elemental effect they apply. Check 'Tipos elementales' in 'Opciones' to see what elements each enemy is immune or weak against.
tip39: Tip: Using 'Romper' you can escape from physical barriers placed on your character. Read the description in your inventory for more information!
tip41: Tip: You won because one of your pawns reached the other side or because the Alcalde does not have any available valid moves.
tip42: Tip: The piglins won't properly talk to you unless you wear full golden armor!
tip43: Tip: You lost because one of the Alcalde's pawns reached your side.
tip46: Tip: Maximum chat ancho (default) in Chat Settings is recommended.
tip47: Tip: During combat, you can flee using 'Opciones'.
tip48: Tip: The Amuleto venenoso only works during combat.
tip49: Tip: You are attacking an enemy with an effect they are immune against. Make sure to check 'Tipos elementales' in 'Opciones' to choose the best weapon.
tip50: Tip: Put items that you may not need anymore into Cofre de enders, to make sure they can't be lost.
tip52: Tip: Remember that the faro shows where you need to go! Checking out what is there should always be the first thing you do!
tip53: Tip: Often a character can be found in the town that provides you with important information about the Capítulo. Make sure you don't miss it!
tip56: Tip: These stories may contain more than just a grain of truth. Perhaps they aren't relevant to the current Capítulo, but surely they still are worth investigating.

book.tr.content.1:
Today, my nephew,
Prince , left on a
diplomatic mission
across the sea. It's
the Prince's first
mission of this sort.
He is expected to be
back in around a
month. My nephew is
thrilled that he is
finally old enough to
go on these missions!
book.tr.content.2:
Two months ago, my
nephew left Invaila,
our port town, with a
ship of the royal
fleet. He was expected
to be back a month
ago, but still, we
haven't heard
anything. King  has
now sent a letter to
Warthford, the
destination of .
book.tr.content.3:
I've never seen my
sister, Queen , so
worried in my entire
life. Warthford sent a
reply, and  never
arrived there.
Tomorrow,  is sending
out all the 137
remaining ships of the
royal fleet to search
the entire ocean for .
book.tr.content.4:
There still has been
no word of . Many of
the ships have
returned, and none
have seen any sign of
. The King's advisors
tell him that ’s ship
must have sunk, but I
can see he has not
yet given up hope.
book.tr.content.5:
left a year ago, and
the entire royal fleet
is back now. The King
gave up hope as well,
there will be a funeral
soon. After hundreds
of years, this is
where the Corazón
Espinoso family dies
out.  was the only heir
to the throne, except
if...
book.tr.content.6:
's funeral was today.
Everyone was
confronted with the
harsh truth that the
death of  was the
ending of the beloved
Corazón Espinoso
dynasty. I do not know
what to do.
book.tr.content.8:
Today something
unbelievable
happened.  entered
the throne room. I'm
suspicious, the Prince
seems a lot colder
than he used to be,
but the King believes
it's truly him.
book.tr.content.10:
To honor 's return, a
banquet was held
today. The King
toasted to his son's
return, while he held
his beer high up, and
the sun, from behind
the King, made it shine
in a yellow-green
color. Today,  smiled
for the first time
since his return.
Maybe it really is him.
book.tr.content.11:
The King suddenly got
very sick. Old age, the
doctor says, but I
know he is wrong. The
king is old, but with his
perfect health, he is
supposed to have
many years left.
Poison. My suspicions
have been right. I'm
sure  or whoever he
actually is, poisoned
the king.
book.tr.content.12:
The King died, a
funeral will be held at
the start of the next
month. Perhaps the
King wouldn't like it,
because he is blinded
from the truth, but it's
time to start the
secret plan. The 
impersonator is not
the heir!
book.tr.content.13:
Only shortly after 's
funeral,  crowned
himself as 'Emperor of
Tharros,' claiming he
couldn't replace his
father, so he chose
another title. I've
considered leaving
the capital, Ankardia,
or even the whole
Kingdom, but I'm more
helpful here!
book.tr.content.14:
The Emperor is a
cruel ruler, so cruel
that I was able to
convince my sister
that he is not actually
her son. She left
Tharros to start a
resistance called ''
while I try to destroy
the Emperor's plans
from the inside.
book.tr.content.15:
The Emperor seems to
trust me. He does not
know I'm 's brother. He
found out about  and
is now spreading news
about an organization
that is kidnapping
people - people that
are actually just
joining the resistance.
book.tr.content.16:
The Emperor is
planning to invade the
whole continent using
the old royal fleet.
"Sadly," we can't
afford it since there
does not seem to be
enough oro. Who could
be responsible?
book.tr.content.17:
- the Emperor's true
name, as he has now
revealed to the High
Council, his "trusted"
advisors like me, is
getting crueler each
day. I need to
proceed with my plans
right now... I need to
find 's hidden
illegitimate son, .
book.tr.content.18:
I'm on a mission to get
a loan so that  can
afford to conquer the
continent, but actually,
I'm looking for .
Supposedly, he is in
Invaila, so that's
where I'll start my
search.
book.tr.content.19:
I found out where 
lived. He left to find
his "kidnapped" sister,
, however. I assume
she left to join , so I
hope  will be able to
find TE and join as
well. I need to end my
search here and
return to the capital.
book.tr.content.20a:
This is it.  has found a
group of TE members
sneaking in the
sewers below the
palace placing
explosives. He
captured them and
executed them on the
spot, but not before
